message: Facharztzentrum Westmecklenburg GmbH is a company that operates in the Medical & Surgical Hospitals industry. It employs 500to999 people and has 25Mto50M of revenue. The company is headquartered in Ludwigslust, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany.  Total Files Listed: 711367 File(s) 384,756,064,224 bytes 398522 Dir(s)  3,634,162,196,480 bytes free
